sections.paragraph: constr. מַמְלֶכֶת, with suff. מַמְלַכְתִּי, plural מַמְלָכֹות (from the root מָלַךְ) f. a kingdom, dominion, used both of the royal dignity, 1Ki 11:11 14:8 1Sa 28:17 and of the country subject to a king. עִיר הַמַּמְלָכָה royal city, Jos 10:2 1Sa 27:5. בֵּית מַמְלָכָה royal abode, Amo 7:13. מַמְלְכֹות הָאָרֶץ kingdoms of the earth, Deu 28:25.
